title: Smoky Smoked Potato Stir-Fry
description: A light and smoky Vietnamese-inspired dish featuring potatoes slow-cooked with a touch of smokiness that satisfies midnight cravings without gluten.

ingredients.name: Shredded Pork (or Tofu for a vegan option)

instructions: Wash and peel the potatoes, then cut them into bite-sized pieces. Sprinkle with garlic powder and pepper corns.
Spread the potato slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and drizzle with olive oil. Roast in the preheated oven for about 15-20 minutes until golden brown.
While the potatoes are roasting, mince the garlic and thinly slice green onions.
In a wok or large skillet, heat some olive oil over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and sliced green onions to sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add shredded pork (or tofu) to the wok and cook for another 2-3 minutes until the meat is lightly browned.
Remove the roasted potatoes from the oven and add them back into the wok. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Serve hot as a light and satisfying dinner dish.
